title: ornithopus minimus
intro: Ornithopus minimus, also known as annual broom or small broom, is a perennial leguminous plant native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and treat various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, and its herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, are believed to offer health benefits such as lowering blood pressure and reducing fever. Additionally, Ornithopus minimus has been used in herbal medicine to treat various other ailments, including coughs and colds, and its antiseptic properties make it useful for wound care.
